title: IMPACT - 211info
text: OSU IMPACT IMPACT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a physical activity program. Participants engage in activities such as swimming, dancing, ball games, climbing wall challenges, and balance exercises. Each child receives individualized attention, support, and encouragement from specially trained OSU undergraduate volunteers or graduate students. 123 Women's Building Corvallis, OR 97331 Eligibility: Serves children with special needs ages 6 months–21. Some services are available for individuals age 21 and older with special needs Hours: School year: Friday 5:30pm-7pm Summer hours: Friday 9:30am-11am Email (541) 737-2176 . .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 737-2176 Dr. Courtney Jost [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information. Fill out application to be placed on waitlist. FEES: $50 per term, scholarships available DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: IMPACT is located on the Oregon State University Campus in the Women's Building. Services: Disability Related Sports Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
